title: Add real-time alerting on KPI thresholds
description: Stakeholders want email and Slack alerts when key KPIs cross configurable thresholds within the same day.
notes: Would require streaming ingestion or higher-frequency polling plus notification channels.

title: Add Excel export for forecast runs
description: Ability to export one-step-ahead forecast results and error metrics to .xlsx for ad-hoc review.
notes: Prefer a lightweight dependency; avoid heavy Office COM automation.
